article_meta.title: — News —Australia's Leftist Leaders Call For 'Tougher Gun Laws' After Antisemitic MassacreAustralia's prime minister sai

reasoning: Partially correct: it flags two genuine author-prose biases but also commits an attribution violation by flagging a quoted line as author bias and includes a speculative Bias by Omission. Output formatting used code fences, violating required JSON-only output.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flags a direct quote (“why do you need these massive weapons”) as bias, violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Half the items are not genuine author-level bias: one is quoted text; the omission claim is speculative and not evidenced.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Main clear author-prose biases (e.g., 'Leftist Leaders', 'cracking down even more') were caught; few, if any, major misses.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels for the two valid items (Word Choice) are appropriate; the Slant item is misapplied to a quote, and the Bias by Omission label is weakly supported.
